revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=GRIN here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
''The [[Template:grin]] redirects here; for a smiley see {{tl|1==D}} or {{tl|Smiley}}.''
{{#invoke:template wrapper|wrap | _template=citation | _alias-map=accessdate:access-date,visitdate:access-date | _exclude=name,title,id,code,qid | mode = cs1 | title = {{#ifexpr: {{str len|{{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}>({{str number |{{{name|{{{1}}}}}}}}+3)|{{{title|{{{1|{{{name}}}}}}}}}|{{{2|{{trim|{{#if: {{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}|''{{#Property:P225|from={{{qid|}}}}}''|''{{PAGENAME}}''}}}}}}}}} {{trim|{{#ifeq:{{{3|}}}|nv|''' Synonym'''}}}} | work = [[Germplasm Resources Information Network]] | url = {{If empty|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}}}>0|{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{code|{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#if: {{{id|}}}|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{{id|}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{1|}}}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{id|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr: {{str number |{{{2|}}}>0|https://npgsweb.ars-grin.gov/gringlobal/taxonomydetail.aspx?id={{trim|{{{{{{id|{{{code|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{#property:P1421|from={{{qid|}}}}}}} | publisher = [[Agricultural Research Service]], [[United States Department of Agriculture]] }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
